description: A vertical graphic. The top half is a photograph of people seated at a table in business attire, with one person gesturing with an open hand toward a woman wearing a pink headscarf and a man in a gray suit across the table. A dark navy panel below holds white text reading Need an interpreter for your USCIS appointment? You must provide your own or reschedule. A Department of Homeland Security seal and the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services appear at the bottom.
notable_text: Need an interpreter for your USCIS appointment? You must provide your own or reschedule.; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services
